_comment: Phase 4.3 (§4b) table-math eval — questions with KNOWN, hand-verified numeric answers against the 'very big' corpus (10-Ks in `test docs/`). The Analyst must compute these deterministically; the bar is 100% correct (a wrong number in finance is a fireable error). Each item: a natural-language question, the doc it resolves in, the expected display value, and a tolerance. Run via eval/test_tablemath_eval.py.

questions.question: What were AWS net sales in 2023?
questions.note: Amazon FY23 segment results, AWS Net sales 2023

questions.question: What was AWS operating income in 2023?
questions.note: Amazon FY23 segment results, AWS Operating income 2023

questions.question: What was the growth rate of AWS net sales from 2022 to 2023?
What was AWS operating margin in 2023?
What were Google's total revenues in 2023?
questions.note: Google FY23 consolidated income statement, Revenues 2023

questions.question: What was Google's net income in 2023?
questions.note: Google FY23 consolidated income statement, Net income 2023

questions.question: What was Microsoft's total revenue in fiscal 2022?
questions.note: MSFT FY22 — DESCENDING period order; tests geometry period labelling
